section4.cardBody: Hard to find through regular searches, but applied for the content verification service provided by Toostar — even without a law firm contract, filed quickly at 1/10 the cost.

items.quote: My photos were found in completely unexpected places — revenue increased and processing time was reduced, leading to explosive results.
items.author: Ji-hyeon Kim

items.quote: Since adopting the service, copyright infringement cases have noticeably decreased. It's a truly reliable detection solution.
items.author: Min-jun Lee

items.quote: Excellent accuracy and fast processing speed. Our team's work efficiency has more than doubled.
